'''âm-z-sh''' ('''kamazash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yarovize|yarovize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-z-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yarovize|yarovize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-z-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kamazash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimazash|thimazash]] || [[word:jimazash|jimazash]] || [[word:shimazash|shimazash]] || [[word:kimazash|kimazash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumazash|thuthumazash]] || [[word:jujumazash|jujumazash]] || [[word:shushumazash|shushumazash]] || [[word:kukumazash|kukumazash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumazash|thumazash]] || [[word:jumazash|jumazash]] || [[word:shumazash|shumazash]] || [[word:kumazash|kumazash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumazash|thumazash]] || [[word:jumazash|jumazash]] || [[word:shumazash|shumazash]] || [[word:kumazash|kumazash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themazash|themazash]] || [[word:jemazash|jemazash]] || [[word:shemazash|shemazash]] || [[word:kemazash|kemazash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomazash|thothomazash]] || [[word:jojomazash|jojomazash]] || [[word:shoshomazash|shoshomazash]] || [[word:kokomazash|kokomazash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomazash|thomazash]] || [[word:jomazash|jomazash]] || [[word:shomazash|shomazash]] || [[word:komazash|komazash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomazash|thomazash]] || [[word:jomazash|jomazash]] || [[word:shomazash|shomazash]] || [[word:komazash|komazash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠmazash|thĂŠmazash]] || [[word:jĂŠmazash|jĂŠmazash]] || [[word:shĂŠmazash|shĂŠmazash]] || [[word:kĂŠmazash|kĂŠmazash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamazash|thathamazash]] || [[word:jajamazash|jajamazash]] || [[word:shashamazash|shashamazash]] || [[word:kakamazash|kakamazash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamazash|thamazash]] || [[word:jamazash|jamazash]] || [[word:shamazash|shamazash]] || [[word:kamazash|kamazash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamazash|thamazash]] || [[word:jamazash|jamazash]] || [[word:shamazash|shamazash]] || [[word:kamazash|kamazash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shamazash|shamazash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshamazash|goshamazash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishamazash|gokishamazash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shamazashnĂŒ|shamazashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshamazashnknĂŒ|goshamazashnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishamazashnĂŒ|gokishamazashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamazashĂ«|shamazashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamazashnkshĂ«|goshamazashnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamazashĂ«|gokishamazashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamazashro|shamazashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamazashnkro|goshamazashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamazashro|gokishamazashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shamazashmu|shamazashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamazashnkmu|goshamazashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamazashmu|gokishamazashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shamazasher|shamazasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshamazashnksher|goshamazashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishamazasher|gokishamazasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shamazashng|shamazashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshamazashnkng|goshamazashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishamazashng|gokishamazashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shamazashya|shamazashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshamazashnkya|goshamazashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishamazashya|gokishamazashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shamazashyam|shamazashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshamazashnkyam|goshamazashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishamazashyam|gokishamazashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamazashnĂŒshĂ«|shamazashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamazashnknĂŒshĂ«|goshamazashnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamazashnĂŒshĂ«|gokishamazashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamazashnĂŒro|shamazashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamazashnknĂŒro|goshamazashnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamazashnĂŒro|gokishamazashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamazashnĂŒmu|shamazashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamazashnknĂŒmu|goshamazashnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamazashnĂŒmu|gokishamazashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamazashĂ«nĂŒ|shamazashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamazashnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshamazashnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamazashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishamazashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamazashĂ«ro|shamazashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamazashnkshĂ«ro|goshamazashnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamazashĂ«ro|gokishamazashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamazashĂ«mu|shamazashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamazashnkshĂ«mu|goshamazashnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamazashĂ«mu|gokishamazashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamazashronĂŒ|shamazashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamazashnkronĂŒ|goshamazashnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamazashronĂŒ|gokishamazashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamazashroshĂ«|shamazashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamazashnkroshĂ«|goshamazashnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamazashroshĂ«|gokishamazashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamazashromu|shamazashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamazashnkromu|goshamazashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamazashromu|gokishamazashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamazashmunĂŒ|shamazashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamazashnkmunĂŒ|goshamazashnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamazashmunĂŒ|gokishamazashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamazashmushĂ«|shamazashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamazashnkmushĂ«|goshamazashnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamazashmushĂ«|gokishamazashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamazashmuro|shamazashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamazashnkmuro|goshamazashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamazashmuro|gokishamazashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
